headline: WhiteBIT wins MiCA license ahead of July 1 deadline

article.title: WhiteBIT secures MiCA license in Austria ahead of July 1 EU deadline
article.summary: The Austrian authorization gives WhiteBIT access to the EU's unified crypto framework, which will require exchanges to hold MiCA licenses or stop serving clients after July 1.

headline: $1B Crypto Plunge Amid Insider Trading Ban Proposal

article.title: Republican lawmaker proposes prediction markets insider trading ban, not including White House officials
article.summary: The bill did not specifically bar members of the US Congress from using the platforms or making sports bets, but prohibited policy wagers.

headline: Latin American FX Gains 1.2% Amid Market Stalemate

article.title: Latin American FX Edge Higher With Markets in ‘Holding Pattern’
article.summary: Most Latin American currencies advanced in a quiet session for global markets amid holidays in the US and parts of Asia, leaving assets in a holding pattern as traders await fresh news out of the Middle East.

headline: Stocks Drop 2% as Iran Talks Falter

article.title: Stocks Stall as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

headline: Kalshi Targets IPO as Revenue Surges to $2B

headline: Lawmakers Face Insider Trading Ban in $1B Crypto Market

article.summary: The bill is meant to curb potential insider trading, blocking lawmakers and family members from policy-related prediction market bets.

article.summary: Brothers Isiah and Raymond Garcia pleaded guilty to an armed $8 million crypto robbery and kidnapping in Minnesota.
